## FI0-10520 - Update get help section across service

### Summary

As an exporter
I need to understand the help routes
So that I can access help for my application when I need to

## User Story

As an exporter

I need to understand the help routes

So that I can access help for my application when I need to

### Acceptance criteria

Scenario 1 - Need help section updated

Given I navigate to any page in my Catch Certificate, Processing Statement or Non-Manipulation Document user journey (except for the dashboard pages and “What do you want to do?” page)

When the page loads

Then the ‘Need help?’ section at the bottom of the page is renamed to ‘Get help with your application’

And below this sub-heading is text of 'If you have a <document name> unique reference number, have it with you when you call.

Phone: 0330 159 1989

Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm (except public holidays)'

Where ‘<document name>’ is ‘catch certificate’, ‘processing statement’ or ‘non-manipulation document’ depending on the journey

And below this text is a hyperlink labelled ‘Find out about call charges’ which links to https://www.gov.uk/call-charges

And below this hyperlink is text ‘Read the guidance on exporting or moving fish from the UK (opens in new tab).’

And the text ‘exporting or moving fish from the UK (opens in new tab).’ is a hyperlink which links to https://www.gov.uk/guidance/exporting-or-moving-fish-from-the-uk#get-help-with-fish-export-documents

Scenario 2 - Welsh translation

Given I navigate to any page in my Catch Certificate, Processing Statement or Non-Manipulation Document user journey

When I have selected Welsh language

Then the help information is translated to Welsh

#### English text

Get help with your application

If you have a <document name> unique reference number, have it with you when you call.

Phone: 0330 159 1989

Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm (except public holidays)

Find out about call charges

Read the guidance on exporting or moving fish from the UK (opens in new tab).

#### Welsh text

Cael help gyda'ch cais

Os oes gennych rif cyfeirnod unigryw <document name>, gofalwch fod hwnnw gennych pan fyddwch chi'n ffonio.

Ffôn: 0330 159 1989

Dydd Llun i ddydd Gwener, 9am i 5pm (ac eithrio gwyliau cyhoeddus)

Gwybodaeth am gostau galwadau

Darllen y canllawiau ar allforio neu symud pysgod o'r DU (yn agor mewn tab newydd).

Scenario 3 - Non-JS

Given I navigate to any page in my Catch Certificate, Processing Statement or Non-Manipulation Document user journey

When javascript is turned off

Then the get help section must be compliant with non javascript

Scenario 4 - Accessibility
Given I navigate to any page in my Catch Certificate, Processing Statement or Non-Manipulation Document user journey

Then the get help section must be compliant with GDS accessibility guidelines

### Acceptance tests

- Add/extend Cypress test(s) to cover the Help Link page validating:
  - The document number
  - Invalid Date Landed shows the correct date error message
  - Vessel name error is not present when Vessel name is valid

### Related files (suggested places to look)

- Landing page component(s) and server-side validation in orchestration
- Tests: `tests/cypress/integration` (landing related specs)
- MSW handlers / fixtures used by landing tests
